title: made Glassbox faster
summary:
spent this week working on Glassbox speed. training was slow before, taking 450 seconds. i added stuck detection so the model knows when it is not learning. now if it gets stuck, it boosts mutations by 2.5x or restarts the population.

i also added progressive refinement. the number of steps drops from 50 to 15 as confidence increases. i am using L-BFGS when confidence is over 0.4. elites also skip re-evaluation now. this saved about 20% of time, bringing average down to 365 seconds. tried sparse routing and lazy evaluation but they made it slower or broke torch.compile, so i removed them. everything works well now.
commitMessages: feat(evolution): Add scalability optimizations and stuck detection
